Is murphy better than tulu for tentacle damage increase?
Uh where's that? <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Murphy's Exalt is Defensive, Tulu's exalt is offensive.
In terms of dmg increase Tulu > Murphy.
In terms of survivability increase Murphy > Tulu.
I can't do the event because there are no supports available to me, is that common?
Does pollux need his wheel or its just a nice thing to have
Oh clem's too
Either you used up the supports yesterday (for some reason they made it so once you use a support you can't use it again for rest of event duration) or need to start adding more people
Thanks!
Yeah, it's probably both
This is broken.
Is this farmable anywhere?
you buy them from the place you're seeing them
and it's really only good on like Ryker
might be some other chars but that's largely the Ryker covenant
Oh
the good keyflare covenant is unlocked after clearing ch7 then you can farm it with stamina
and for dmg dealers you just use Steppenwolf until you unlock the appropriate covenant for your char(which sometimes is still steppenwolf, sometimes other stuff like dream or the flower one)
What’s a good healing covenent?

usually you don't really use one, the healers will either be keyflare or have their own stuff like death resist if they scale off it or the defense one for some shielders and such, as a generic option early on you can use Deus Ex Machina though
you get it for clearing ch1(so it's unlocked right away) then farm with stamina, it's not an endgame covenant but it's nice to have on everyone not doing dmg until you get more specialized stuff
I’m trying to figure out how to sustain or take less damage in tawil team or even gmurphy team.
Using murphy only mitigates damage and from exalt.
that's not going to be a covenant thing and more a character thing, although if you're using Nautila you can get her Feast from Afar for 60% def for bigger shields(lightless crystal shop)
Might use her instead of romana.
Rng is strong on this team

you can run rare wheels Gluttony if you're having issues, it'll give you a lot of hp by not picking an Orison, and you should use Frenzy to add relics in the shop to make the runs easier, can replace some of these SR wheels
Oh right investigation I do relatively fine (despite the lvl lock), but when fighting the event’s murphy boss she does so much damage, and has shield that mitigates damage.
+ sacrifice

the special OPs one? yeah that's just going to be weirdly balanced since it's meant to be recent content, I think they scale you but they don't give you covenant/finished wheels and stuff like that, not sure how beatable it is as a new player

Possible but is sweaty. You can’t outheal sacrifice. Str down helps against the boss, but then take damage from sacrifice. Later on with low hp it becomes near impossible to survive with sacrifice, tentacles and her own attacks.
this dmg reduction mechanic. <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...

content: Oh this is perfect. Thanks!
In the special Raid event, I'm doing it with a Kath team -- is it worth it to go up to her OE or just regular Exalt?
kath oe is not worth it unless you spend a significant amount of money
it's not particularly bad or anything, but there's really nothing oe kath can do that e3 kath can't already do
it's a fairly minor upgrade for a significant resource cost
I'm borrowing a maxed Kath, aside from that its all normal
is her OE worth going to or just using her normal Exalt during a fight?
you're mainly gonna be using her normal exalt
don't go for her OE
spend your pulls on another OE
Like?

btw, what should I use my limited pulls for now?
Do I go for a new character (clem or pollux) or Castor dupes? 
I still have the free posse event character to choose
I’d E3 Castor, then just pick and choose based on who you like
I also have 3 of the monthly dupe stuff, so I can technically use it all on Castor...though I was told to save them for an OE target so I dunno
I’d save them for an OE because one more month and you can get anyone to OE
(Or two if OE is +5)
Saving you pulls really.
And Since Castor does have a known rate up I think its better to pull on that than spend the dupes

Nautilia?

I dont super get how the raid event works, I beat the boss once, apparently I'm supposed to keep beating it multiple times? how does that improve the rewards?
You get the reward each time you clear it
You can keep doing it until you have available awakeners/supports
Silver included? Is it worth farming?
Yes
Oh nvm, I cant reuse characters, I dont have enough of a roster
My actual win had 4 deaths door resistances
Yep u can't. And the supports are once per event only. You can read the rules, everything is written there.
And it’d be worse with gramora /karen since I can’t burst three times without probably triggering at least one death’s door
Awesome🙏 🎉
does this mean that the boss tomorrow I wont be able to reuse the same team? or only the support?
Only the support.
That's why you need to add more supports if you want to continue doing the further runs.

You get an SSR every 30 pulls.

You can get 2 Standard SSRs then a gaurnteed Limited (the banner you are pulling on) on the 90th pull.

Yes if lucky you can get earlier than 90.

The garunteed pity timer is 90.

i guess my question is that in the case above does the guaranteed timer then move to 67 (if 13 and 37 are both standard SSRs, due to SSR pity and Banner pity being 2 different timer)

Yes. After you pull an SSR the pity resets to 30.

Two standards in a row and the next SSR pull is the banner unit.
